hooks.command: git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR -- '*.ts' '*.tsx' '*.js' '*.jsx' '*.json' | xargs -r deno fmt 2>/dev/null; git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR -- '*.ts' '*.tsx' '*.js' '*.jsx' '*.json' | xargs -r git add
hooks.statusMessage: Formatting staged files with deno fmt...
